granted.action: sst secret set SendblueFromNumber + deploy (A.7 follow-on)
BasicsWorkerTaskRoleArtifactsPolicy + 4 worker image rebuilds + pool drains (A.9)
granted.blastRadius: IAM additive; image refresh; autoscaler respawn

history.summary: Worker task def env wired with SENDBLUE/SES/ARTIFACTS.
SES IaC option A; basics-runtime-outbound + SNS + IAM.
send_email tool; live SES e2e to operator inbox.
send_sms tool; live Sendblue DELIVERED to operator phone; 3 bugs fixed.

Live integrated smoke green across runs 5 (full smoke) + 6 (MMS-with-screenshot). 6 total runs in this step caught and fixed 4 real bugs: (1) worker IAM s3:PutObject missing, (2) opencode-plugin not injecting quotaStore, (3) PgQuotaStore sharing aggressively-idle-timed pg connection, (4) screenshot tool had no S3 persistence so the agent couldn't pass screenshot bytes to send_email/send_sms. Operator-confirmed delivery on inbox + phone (email + SMS + MMS). Screenshot tool now persists to S3 by default and returns {s3Key, signedUrl, byteLength, mimeType}.
Worker task def revision :19 contains COMPOSIO_API_KEY (additive env wiring).
Applied automations_b2_composio_tables: composio_tool_cache + external_action_audit + pg_cron reaper. Fixture green. Mirrored to api/drizzle.

Composio connection resolver at session boot. 6/6 unit tests + tsc clean. Live e2e (run f3e95ab4-…) emitted composio_resolved event with accountCount=3 toolkitSlugs=[gmail,googlecalendar,googlesheets]. Reviewer: ship.
PgComposioToolCache; 6/6 unit tests; live integration deferred to B.6.
emitExternalAction + scrubPreview; 13/13 unit tests; reviewer ship.

composio_list_tools tool; live e2e produced toolkits[3]/gmail[63 miss]/gmail+thread[14 hit]/gmail[63 hit]; closes B.4 deferred-verification. Caught jsonb double-encoding bug + silent docker-build-failure pattern.

composio_call tool with all 6 plan branches (a-f): no_connection, happy+audit, connection_expired (3 status patterns), rate_limited (429), schema_mismatch retry success, schema_mismatch double-failure, plus per-toolkit semaphore (default 3) serialization and cross-toolkit independence. 10/10 unit tests + tsc clean. Live e2e (run d971d2bb-…, image v9): composio_call('GMAIL_LIST_THREADS', {max_results:1}) returned ok:true with real Gmail thread 19e20467bb821ef9; external_action event + external_action_audit row both landed correctly. Closes B.5 deferred-verification too.

deferredVerificationsClosed.note: B.6 chat run exercised the cache MISS→write→HIT cycle live; jsonb_typeof=array, length=63.
B.7 live run wrote external_action_audit row + external_action activity event with redacted preview.

operatorDecisions.decision: No git push between loop iterations
Run live e2e for every feature; never skip
Test on production directly; mint workspace JWTs/keys via Supabase MCP for the loop's own use
Skip the SMS-with-JSON-link confirmation run — same code path as plain send_sms already exercised in run 4/5
